X-Postmark-Server-Token.description: Postmark server token, sent as the X-Postmark-Server-Token header for server-level endpoints. Never logged.

base_url.description: Postmark API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for legacy native connector fixture mode.

bulk_request_id.description: Postmark bulk request id used by the corresponding detail stream.

bounce_id.description: Postmark bounce id used by the corresponding detail stream.

template_id_or_alias.description: Postmark template id or alias used by the corresponding detail stream.

message_stream_id.description: Postmark message stream id used by the corresponding detail stream.

message_id.description: Postmark message id used by the corresponding detail stream.

webhook_id.description: Postmark webhook id used by the corresponding detail stream.
